name: NEOM — Design Standards & Sustainability
standard: NEOM Design Standards (THE LINE / Oxagon / Trojena / Sindalah)
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that check submittals against the NEOM design-standards portfolio: net-zero embodied carbon targets, renewable-energy share, biodiversity protection, mobility-corridor setbacks, and the NEOM Authority approval chain for THE LINE, Oxagon, Trojena and Sindalah.
